title: Scene 6 · The Scoop
imagePrompt: a Mission cafe, exposed brick, a male tech reporter holding a notepad leaning across a small table, founder's hands wrapped around a coffee cup, two-shot, mid-morning soft light

dialogue.speaker: reporter
dialogue.text: Three sources inside your batch say there's a goodbye thread already drafted. Want to confirm or correct it?

dialogue.speaker: reporter
dialogue.text: I'm running it either way. Your version, or the one that bleeds.

choices.label: Trade for a better angle.
choices.consequence: A competitor's leak takes the slot.

title: Scene 7 · The Term Sheet
imagePrompt: the bar at Rosewood Sand Hill at golden hour, a patrician VC in a tailored blazer across a marble table, founder's hands clasped, a leather portfolio between them, cinematic two-shot

dialogue.speaker: vc
dialogue.text: Three million, fifteen percent. We pick the next hire. Offer expires when the bill comes.

dialogue.speaker: vc
dialogue.text: Tell me something true that almost nobody agrees with you on.

choices.label: Take it.
choices.consequence: Cap table goes from yours to theirs.

choices.label: Walk away.
choices.consequence: The check goes to a competitor.

title: Scene 8 · The Hater Tweet
imagePrompt: rooftop bar in SoMa at golden hour, a competing-startup CEO in expensive streetwear leaning on a railing, phone in hand showing a tweet, founder's silhouette half-turned, two-shot, smug condescension

dialogue.speaker: hater
dialogue.text: Big fan. Just posted a thread. Bold of you to brand a pivot like that.

dialogue.speaker: hater
dialogue.text: My Series B closed at four-fifty post. Just so you know what real numbers look like.

title: Scene 9 · The Reckoning
imagePrompt: founder's apartment kitchen at midnight, a stranger from the YC batch leaning on the counter with a phone in hand, screen glow on their face, founder seated, two-shot, raw confrontation

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text: Your phone lights up. Someone from the batch wants to talk equity. They claim they have leverage.

dialogue.speaker: cofounder
dialogue.text: Whatever you decide tonight — choose carefully. The screen goes dark in your hand.

choices.label: Tell them straight.
choices.consequence: One of you leaves by morning.

title: Scene 10 · Last Office Hours
imagePrompt: a Palo Alto cafe at 8am, a YC partner pouring coffee from a French press, founder seated across with a closed laptop, soft morning light, intimate two-shot

dialogue.speaker: mentor
dialogue.text: When the Bloomberg piece runs in eighteen months, what's the headline you want?

dialogue.speaker: mentor
dialogue.text: Don't tell me. Tell yourself. Then ship something this week that proves it.

choices.label: Build quietly. No press.
choices.consequence: Next news is a Series B.

choices.label: Lean in. Be the story.
choices.consequence: Podcast tour books out the month.
